events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"high","work_stage":"in-progress","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":60,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.9,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Inadequate bracing/kickers for concrete pour pressure","Formwork bracing insufficient to resist lateral pressures during placement per ACI 347","Risk of form failure/blowout during active pour causing material collapse and worker injury"],"actions":["Halt pour/placement operations immediately","Redesign and install adequate bracing/kickers to resist calculated pour pressures per ACI 347","Have formwork engineer/competent person inspect and approve bracing before resuming pour","Verify shoring/bracing spacing, angle, and anchorage meet approved formwork drawings"],"rationale":"Inadequate bracing for pour pressure is a critical safety hazard under ACI 347; formwork must be designed and braced to withstand lateral concrete pressures. Active pour with insufficient bracing risks catastrophic form failure.","references":["ACI 347"]}
